import React, { useState } from "react"; import "./FormPage.css"; import axios from "axios"; function FormPage() { //States for all the fields const [formdata,setFormdata] = useState({ name: "", phone: "", pickup: "", destination: "", weight: "", date: "", time: "", vehicle: "", price: "" }); const [responseMessage, setResponseMessage] = useState(''); const [errorMessage, setErrorMessage] = useState(''); const handleSubmit = async (e) => { e.preventDefault(); // Prevent the default form submission behavior try { const response = await axios.post('https://bidwheels-api-env.eba-ts5rcstj.us-east-1.elasticbeanstalk.com/user/createOrder', formData); console.log('Response:', response.data); // Set response message or perform additional actions setResponseMessage('Form submitted successfully!'); setErrorMessage(''); } catch (error) { console.error('Error:', error); setErrorMessage('Failed to submit the form. Please try again.'); setResponseMessage(''); } }; return (
